Hero.subtitle: HIGH-PERFORMANCE WORKSHOP
Hero.headline: Precision that connects, care that transforms.
Hero.paragraph: Technology, personalized planning and surgical technical precision to deliver predictable, clear and custom-made overhauls for each cyclist.
Hero.cardText: Active partnerships with the largest elite parts and tools suppliers in the international market.

Stats.title: Thiago Bustamante
Stats.description: Mechanic Challenge Champion, Thiago is the technical mastermind behind Thiago Workshop School. He is widely recognized in the national cycling scene for his millimetric precision and dedication to high-performance maintenance.
Stats.desafioDesc: National Champion in the country's biggest tournament

About.title: Thiago Bustamante
About.paragraph1: Recognized in the national cycling scene, Thiago is widely respected for his extreme technical dedication. National champion of the Mechanic Challenge, he consolidated his career by ensuring the perfect operation of bikes competing at the highest level.
About.paragraph2: Based in São José dos Campos - SP, he commands the Thiago Workshop School, a concept center where he works in the surgical maintenance of suspensions, links and electronic transmissions, in addition to training the next generation of elite professional mechanics in Brazil.
About.bullet1: Leader in precision and technical knowledge
About.bullet2: International tooling from the best brands
About.bullet3: On-site technical support at world competitions

Services.title: Specialized Activities and Services
Services.description: We offer high-precision services and market-leading educational programs for demanding cyclists and future mechanics.
Services.card1Desc: High-precision mechanical services. Advanced diagnostics and complete overhauls for MTB, Road and Triathlon using premium international standard tools.
Services.card2Desc: In-person professional training at the Workshop School and digital format on the Hotmart platform. Detailed maintenance of complex suspensions and electronic systems.
Services.card3Desc: Acting on the front line providing neutral and specialized mechanical support in high-performance national and international cycling competitions.

School.title: Our Suspension & Mechanics Courses
School.description: High-performance technical specialization with Thiago Mecânico. Learn from the professional method directly from the workbench.
School.hotmartCourseDesc: Online practical course focusing on diagnosis, maintenance, and high-precision tuning.

FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.description: Quickly resolve your queries about our workshop, scheduling, turnarounds, and warranties.
FAQ.a1: You can schedule directly via our WhatsApp. We will perform a pre-appraisal of your bike to secure any necessary replacement parts before your arrival.
FAQ.q2: Do you offer a warranty on services?
FAQ.a2: Yes, we offer a comprehensive 30-day warranty on all adjustments, in addition to manufacturer warranties on all installed spare parts.
FAQ.q3: Do you perform maintenance on imported suspensions?
FAQ.a3: Yes, we are specialists in Fox, RockShox, Cannondale Lefty, and other elite brands, using official manufacturer tools and original suspension fluids.
FAQ.q4: What is the average turnaround time for a complete overhaul?
FAQ.a4: Our standard turnaround is 24 to 48 hours, depending on spare part availability and the technical complexity of the diagnostic process.

Testimonials.title: Trusted by Riders and Professionals
Testimonials.desc: Read feedback from high-performance athletes and mechanics who trained at our workshop school.
Testimonials.t1Text: The calibration on my Fox suspension was surgical. The bike felt incredibly stable on technical downhill sections.
Testimonials.t2Text: My Shimano Di2 electronic drivetrain is performing flawlessly. Thiago explains every detail of the diagnostic before starting the work.
Testimonials.t3Text: The suspension servicing course was the best investment I've made. The individual practical workbench makes all the difference.
